name: Labrynth Stovie Torbie
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白銀の城の火吹炉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ラビュリンス・ストービー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl_base: Fire-Breathing Stove of the Silver Castle
desc: (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY and discard 1 card; Set 1 "Labrynth" Spell/Trap from your hand or Deck. If a monster(s) leaves the field by your Normal Trap effect, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Labrynth Stovie Torbie" once per turn.
mnst_eff: (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY and discard 1 card; Set 1 "Labrynth" Spell/Trap from your hand or Deck. If a monster(s) leaves the field by your Normal Trap effect, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Labrynth Stovie Torbie" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
